description: Determines the properties of the creature's animate ability.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's animate ability.

entries.description: The creature can only animate a single object at a time.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can only animate a single object at a time.

entries.description: The creature can animate more than one object at a time.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can animate more than one object at a time.

entries.description: The creature must initially touch the object to animate it.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature must initially touch the object to animate it.

entries.description: The creature can animate multiple objects within a wide range (determined by the GM).

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can animate multiple objects within a wide range (determined by the GM).

entries.description: The creature can control the objects as long as it concentrates, but the objects revert to normal when the creature is gone or no longer concentrating.

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can control the objects as long as it concentrates, but the objects revert to normal when the creature is gone or no longer concentrating.

entries.description: The animated objects will continue functioning for a time (determined by the GM) even after the animator is gone. In this case, the objects can be given some degree of programming or autonomy to control their own actions.

descriptionTranslations.en: The animated objects will continue functioning for a time (determined by the GM) even after the animator is gone. In this case, the objects can be given some degree of programming or autonomy to control their own actions.

entries.description: The creature can animate a very common substance (i.e., water, air).

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can animate a very common substance (i.e., water, air).

entries.description: The creature can animate a less common substance (planes, vines).

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can animate a less common substance (planes, vines).

entries.description: The creature can animate something that is rare (lava, a particular car).

descriptionTranslations.en: The creature can animate something that is rare (lava, a particular car).

entries.description: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.
